creator: dirk@ironbark.bendigo.latrobe.edu.au
text:
The machine continues to reproduce the crash on a daily basis, while i have managed to turn debugging on and duming, i have not managed to capture this as expected the the /var/crash directory. As for simularities on all occasions the machine has been standing ideal for some time with the screen saver active (a blnk screen) when i return to the machien a either hit shift, or move the mouse, the machine reboots, on some occasions suppodley dumping on others simply rebooting. I have no problem in making the problem re-occur, however i can not identify the process which may be to blame.
I have added a new user account for you to be able to evaluate the problem i have forwarded these details to grog@freebsd.org

regards,
    Dirk Bellmann.
